testcase.name: testSearch
testcase.system-out:
20:31:06.373 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.backend.RedisSearchTest]: RedisSearchTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 20:31:06.544 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.backend.BackendApplication for test class com.example.backend.RedisSearchTest

:: Spring Boot :: (v3.5.12)
2026-04-15T20:31:07.270+08:00 WARN 9572 --- [smart-library-backend] [ main] ory$DuplicateJsonObjectContextCustomizer :
Found multiple occurrences of org.json.JSONObject on the class path:
jar:file:/C:/Users/86188/.m2/repository/com/vaadin/external/google/android-json/0.0.20131108.vaadin1/android-json-0.0.20131108.vaadin1.jar!/org/json/JSONObject.class jar:file:/C:/Users/86188/.m2/repository/org/json/json/20250107/json-20250107.jar!/org/json/JSONObject.class
You may wish to exclude one of them to ensure predictable runtime behavior

Found 0 Redis repository interfaces. Logging initialized using 'class org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl' adapter. Get /172.29.48.1 network interface Get network interface info: name:eth12 (Hyper-V Virtual Ethernet Adapter) Initialization Sequence datacenterId:26 workerId:27 _ _ |_ _ _|_. ___ _ | _ | | |\/|_)(_| | |_\ |_)||_|_\ / | 3.5.7 BookRecommendationTool: 手动初始化 JedisPooled (localhost:6379) BookRecommendationTool: 图书向量存储器初始化成功 2026-04-15T20:31:14.464+08:00 INFO 9572 --- [smart-library-backend] [ main] com.example.backend.RedisSearchTest : Started RedisSearchTest in 7.674 seconds (process running for 9.007) 图书向量索引已存在（包含 31 条记录），跳过初始化。 ====== STARTING DELETE TEST ====== ESCAPED 1: test\.pdf ESCAPED 2 (No escape): test.pdf
